name: Reduced Calorie Fruit Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 package (8 oz) softened light cream cheese
Fruit cut into bite-sized pieces (e.g., pineapple, bananas, blueberries, kiwi)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Combine flour and artificial sweetener in a bowl.
3. Cut in margarine until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Lightly spray the center of a pizza pan or cookie sheet with vegetable coating spray.
5. Dust fingers lightly with flour, then press dough into the prepared pan.
6. Bake crust for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Let cool completely.
8. In a separate bowl, combine softened cream cheese and vanilla extract.
9. Spread filling evenly over the cooled crust.
10. Arrange fruit in decorative pattern on top of the filling.
11. Prepare glaze by mixing orange juice concentrate, lemon juice, cornstarch, and artificial sweetener in a saucepan with enough water to make 1 cup.
12. Cook mixture over low heat until thickened, stirring constantly.
13. Let glaze cool slightly before spreading gently over the fruit.
14. Chill pizza for at least 30 minutes before serving.
15. Cut into wedges and serve.
